subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Through His boundless celestial grace, the Sun of the Primal Word hath risen from the horizon of the heaven of Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل نامتناهی ربانی شمس کلمه اولیه از افق سماء اراده مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
